name: cds95-classroom
description: CDS95 실시간 도착 미션 학습 플랫폼

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check public/js/terrain.js && node --check public/js/ocean-current.js && node --check lib/mission-catalog.js && node --check lib/classroom-store.js && node --check lib/fatigue.js && node --check lib/arrival-zones.js && npm run check:catalog && npm run check:html
scripts.check:catalog: node -e "for (const f of ['places','original-cities','items','templates','ready-missions','arrival-zones']) JSON.parse(require('node:fs').readFileSync('data/catalog/'+f+'.json','utf8')); console.log('catalog JSON ok')"
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run test:terrain && npm run test:arrival-zones && npm run test:v23 && npm run test:v23:current
